ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the company is based */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector the company belongs to */,
  "company_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company type (public, private) */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "total_employees" INTEGER /* Total number of employees */,
  "headquarters_city" TEXT /* City where the company headquarters is located */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_company_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_type_id") REFERENCES company_types ("company_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical structures) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the sector was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the sector was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_capitalizations" (
  "market_cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market capitalization entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the market capitalization belongs to */,
  "market_cap_value" TEXT /* Market capitalization value of the company */,
  "market_cap_added" TEXT /* Change in market capitalization value */,
  "change" TEXT /* Percentage change in market capitalization value */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the market capitalization value was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market capitalization data (e.g., external API, manual entry) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the market capitalization is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_capitalizations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_types" (
  "company_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company type */,
  "company_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the company type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_capitalization_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market capitalization range */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value for the range */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value for the range */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_sector_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical sector assignment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the sector assignment belongs to */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sector assigned */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the sector assignment was effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the sector assignment ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_sector_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_sector_history_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_capitalization_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical market capitalization entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the market capitalization belongs to */,
  "market_cap_value" TEXT /* Market capitalization value of the company */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the market capitalization value was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical market capitalization data */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the historical market capitalization is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_capitalization_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, investor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the company */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (draft, published, archived) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report component */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the component belongs to */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of report component (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "component_data" TEXT /* Data for the report component */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Order in which the components should be displayed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_components_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_components_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
